name: Flower Cardian Clover with Boar
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>花札衛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カーディアン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>萩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>に<ruby lang="jp"><rb>猪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いのしし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 1 "Flower Cardian" monster, except "Flower Cardian Clover with Boar". If this card is Special Summoned: Draw 1 card, and if you do, show it, then, if it is a "Flower Cardian" monster, you can destroy 1 monster your opponent controls. Otherwise, send it to the Graveyard.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 1 "Flower Cardian" monster, except "Flower Cardian Clover with Boar". If this card is Special Summoned: Draw 1 card, and if you do, show it, then, if it is a "Flower Cardian" monster, you can destroy 1 monster your opponent controls. Otherwise, send it to the Graveyard.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 1 "Flower Cardian" monster, except "Flower Cardian Clover with Boar". If this card is Special Summoned: Draw 1 card, and if you do, show it, then, if it is a "Flower Cardian" monster, you can destroy 1 monster your opponent controls. Otherwise, send it to the Graveyard.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
